name: build_steps_breakdown
summary: Show the intermediate build steps/plan (what to craft at each tier), not just the flat material total.
description: Builds on material_summary by presenting a step-by-step build plan/diagram: e.g. 'use 8000 Tritanium (+ others) to make 10 Acolyte I drones' and 'use 4000 Tritanium (+ others) to make 10 R.A.M. Robotics', continuing up through every tier to the final product. Done when a multi-tier recipe produces a readable ordered list/diagram of build steps rather than just a flat totals list.
